reason: WAYFINDER agent-consensus 3-of-3 HIGH: name+NCT don't match any real tezepelumab program; effect identical to SIROCCO (copy-paste fingerprint)
QuANTUM-R label on NCT02668653 wrong; NCT belongs to QuANTUM-First (newly diagnosed FLT3+AML, Erba Lancet 2023). QuANTUM-R is a different trial.
PSILO-MDD label uses PMID 33999283 which is not the COMP-001 Goodwin NEJM 2022 paper for NCT03775200
QUILT-3032 N-803+BCG (Chamie 2023) correct NCT is NCT03022825 (originally QUILT-3.0xx); NCT04165116 is a different study
estimandType=MD inconsistent with HR=7.0 (CI 3.0-11.0); X:BOT relapse outcome — needs re-extraction
ILLUMENATE EU (Stellarex DCB, Krishnan Circulation 2017) correct NCT is NCT01927068; NCT01858363 is a different DCB study
PEDAP (Wadwa NEJM 2023) correct NCT is NCT04796779; NCT04420572 doesn't match
HELIOS-B vutrisiran ATTR-CM (Fontana NEJM 2024) correct NCT is NCT04153149; NCT05534659 does not match
PMID 41950473 is >4×10^7, impossible for current PubMed range — fabricated

NCT03533790 is AMBER trial (patiromer+spironolactone Agarwal Lancet 2019), labelled 'REGAIN' (galcanezumab CH = different trial); extracted tE=tN=145 (100% response) is biologically implausible — provenance broken
